name: Olive Garden Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay out enough dry lasagna strips in a 9x13 pan to ensure you have enough for three full layers with minimal overlap on each layer.
2. Remove the dry strips and cook according to package instructions until barely "al dente" and drain.
3. Divide the Alfredo sauce into two equal portions. Refrigerate one portion for later use.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and blend thoroughly with a rubber spatula. Set aside at room temperature.
5. Coat the bottom and sides of a 9x13 baking dish with vegetable spray.
6. Lay out cooked lasagna strips (about 4) to cover the entire bottom.
7. Spread 1-1/4 cups of the ricotta cheese mix evenly over the strips.
8. Top with 8 cups of the vegetable mixture and spread evenly.
9. Lay out 9 mozzarella slices to cover the veggie layer.
10. Repeat steps 6-9 for a second layer.
11. Top the second layer of mozzarella slices with lasagna strips and spread them evenly with 1-1/4 cups of ricotta cheese mix to finish.
12. Spray a sheet of foil with vegetable spray and cover the baking dish tightly with the foil, sprayed side down.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for about an hour or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F.
14. Remove from the oven and allow to sit for a few minutes, covered, before cutting and serving.
15. Immediately prior to serving, heat the reserved portion of Alfredo Sauce and ladle the hot sauce over each slice of lasagna as it is served.
